text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 95 

MDCR_NF_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Nursing Facility months (from MDS) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of months during the year where the beneficiary was in a nursing 
facility (NF), according to the Minimum Data Set (MDS) assessment. A hierarchical algorithm is used, 
so that NF is only counted for the month if there is not a Medicare long-term care hospital or skilled 
nursing facility claim. 

TYPE: NUM
